controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural
Banks - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: 1These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rrbs' and individually as 'an rrb')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'RRBs' and individually as 'an RRB').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rrbs' and individually as 'an rrb')

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'debtor company' means any company to which an rrb currently has or previously had a loan or investment
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Debtor company' means any company to which an RRB currently has
or previously had a loan or investment exposure (excluding equity
instruments) anytime during the preceding twelve months;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'debtor company' means any company to which an rrb currently has or previously had a loan or investment

controls.control_objective: To ensure equity shares, compulsorily convertible preference shares (ccps) and compulsorily convertible debentures (ccd)
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to equity shares, compulsorily convertible preference shares (ccps) and compulsorily convertible debentures (ccd)

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company engaged in the 'business of financial services'
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Financial Services Company' means a company engaged in the
'business of financial services'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company engaged in the 'business of financial services'

controls.control_objective: To ensure include -
controls.control_description: Explanation: The 'business of financial services' shall include -
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include -

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider and approve any proposal to undertake marketing of mutual fund units as an agent as prescribed in paragraph 18
controls.control_description:
The Board of a RRB shall consider and approve any proposal to undertake
marketing of mutual fund units as an agent as prescribed in paragraph 18.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider and approve any proposal to undertake marketing of mutual fund units as an agent as prescribed in paragraph 18

controls.control_objective: To ensure pass a resolution approving the proposal to that effect
controls.control_description:
The Board of a RRB desirous of undertaking insurance business as a corporate
agent without risk participation shall pass a resolution approving the proposal to
that effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pass a resolution approving the proposal to that effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve any proposal from the rrb to enter into a longer-term contract for undertaking insurance business on a referral basis, upon completion of the
controls.control_description:
The Board may approve any proposal from the RRB to enter into a longer-term
contract for undertaking insurance business on a referral basis, upon completion
of the initial period of the existing arrangement as prescribed in clause (5) of
paragraph 23.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve any proposal from the rrb to enter into a longer-term contract for undertaking insurance business on a referral basis, upon completion of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve a policy on merchant acquisition for card transactions as prescribed in clause (2) of paragraph 27
controls.control_description:
The Board shall approve a policy on merchant acquisition for card transactions
as prescribed in clause (2) of paragraph 27.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to approve a policy on merchant acquisition for card transactions as prescribed in clause (2) of paragraph 27

controls.control_objective: To ensure have suitable provisions governing its investments in an aif scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations
controls.control_description:
An RRB's investment policy shall have suitable provisions governing its
investments in an AIF Scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have suitable provisions governing its investments in an aif scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of an aif scheme
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall not individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of
an AIF Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of an aif scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme
controls.control_description:
The aggregate contribution by all Regulated Entities (REs) in any AIF Scheme
shall not be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean: (1) commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks)
controls.control_description:
In this context, 'RE' shall mean:
(1) Commercial Banks (including Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean: (1) commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to make 100 percent provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the aif scheme
controls.control_description:
Where an RRB contributes more than five percent of the corpus of an AIF
Scheme that has downstream investment (excluding equity instruments) in a
debtor company of the RRB, the RRB shall be required to make 100 percent
provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company
through the AIF Scheme, subject to a cap equivalent to RRB's direct loan and /
or investment exposure to the said debtor company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to make 100 percent provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the aif scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure deduct the entire investment from its capital funds - proportionately from both tier-1 and tier-2 capital (wherever applicable)
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the provisions of paragraph 13, where a RE's contribution is in
the form of subordinated units, it shall deduct the entire investment from its
capital funds - proportionately from both Tier-1 and Tier-2 capital (wherever
applicable).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deduct the entire investment from its capital funds - proportionately from both tier-1 and tier-2 capital (wherever applicable)

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in consultation with the government of india, by way of a notification, exempt certain aifs (annex i) from these directions on aif contained in part b of chapter ii
controls.control_description:
2The RBI may, in consultation with the Government of India, by way of a
notification, exempt certain AIFs (Annex I) from these Directions on AIF
contained in Part B of Chapter II, except for paragraph 10.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in consultation with the government of india, by way of a notification, exempt certain aifs (annex i) from these directions on aif contained in part b of chapter ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure only act as an agent of the customers, forwarding applications of the investors for purchase / sale of mf units to the mutual fund / registrar / trans
controls.control_description:
RRB may, with the approval of their Board, enter into agreement with
Mutual Funds for marketing their units, subject to the following terms and
conditions:
(1) An RRB shall only act as an agent of the customers, forwarding
applications of the investors for purchase / sale of MF units to the Mutual
Fund / Registrar / Transfer Agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only act as an agent of the customers, forwarding applications of the investors for purchase / sale of mf units to the mutual fund / registrar / trans

controls.control_objective: To ensure guarantee any assured return
controls.control_description:
(2) The purchase of MF units shall be at the risk of customers and the RRB
shall not guarantee any assured return.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to guarantee any assured return

controls.control_objective: To ensure neither acquire such units of mutual fund from the secondary market nor buy back units of mutual funds from their customers
controls.control_description:
(3) An RRB shall neither acquire such units of Mutual Fund from the
secondary market nor buy back units of Mutual Funds from their
customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to neither acquire such units of mutual fund from the secondary market nor buy back units of mutual funds from their customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that its own investment and investments belonging to their customers are kept distinct from each other
controls.control_description:
(4) An RRB holding custody of MF units on behalf of their customers shall
ensure that its own investment and investments belonging to their
customers are kept distinct from each other.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that its own investment and investments belonging to their customers are kept distinct from each other

controls.control_objective: To ensure confine retailing of units of mutual funds to branches
controls.control_description: (5) An RRB shall confine retailing of units of Mutual Funds to branches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to confine retailing of units of mutual funds to branches

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the extant kyc / aml guidelines in respect of the applicants
controls.control_description:
(6) An RRB shall comply with the extant KYC / AML guidelines in respect of
the applicants.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to comply with the extant kyc / aml guidelines in respect of the applicants

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place adequate and effective control mechanisms in consultation with its sponsor bank
controls.control_description:
(7) An RRB shall put in place adequate and effective control mechanisms in
consultation with its sponsor bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place adequate and effective control mechanisms in consultation with its sponsor bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the details of the tie-up, together with a copy of the agreement entered into with the mutual fund, to concerned regional office of rbi within
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall report the details of the tie-up, together with a copy of the
agreement entered into with the Mutual Fund, to concerned Regional Office of
RBI within a period of ten days from the date of entering into the arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the details of the tie-up, together with a copy of the agreement entered into with the mutual fund, to concerned regional office of rbi within

controls.control_objective: To ensure take up corporate agency business, without risk participation, for distribution of all types of insurance products, including health and animal insurance
controls.control_description:
An RRB may take up corporate agency business, without risk participation, for
distribution of all types of insurance products, including health and animal
insurance, subject to the following conditions:
(1) An RRB should comply with the Insurance Regulatory and Development
Authority of India (IRDAI) regulations for acting as 'composite corporate
agent'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take up corporate agency business, without risk participation, for distribution of all types of insurance products, including health and animal insurance

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt any restrictive practice of forcing its customers to purchase insurance products of a particular insurance company in respect of assets financed
controls.control_description:
<image>
(2) An RRB should not adopt any restrictive practice of forcing its customers
to purchase insurance products of a particular insurance company in
respect of assets financed by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt any restrictive practice of forcing its customers to purchase insurance products of a particular insurance company in respect of assets financed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to exercise their own choice
controls.control_description:
The customers should be allowed to
exercise their own choice.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to exercise their own choice

controls.control_objective: To ensure get transferred to the business of the rrb
controls.control_description:
(3) The risks, if any, arising from insurance business should not get
transferred to the business of the RRB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to get transferred to the business of the rrb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be purely on a voluntary basis
controls.control_description:
(4) The participation of customers in insurance products shall be purely on
a voluntary basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be purely on a voluntary basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly state this in all publicity material distributed by them, in a prominent manner
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall clearly state this in all publicity material
distributed by them, in a prominent manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly state this in all publicity material distributed by them, in a prominent manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no 'linkage' either direct or indirect between the provision of banking services offered by the rrb to its customers and use of the insurance produ
controls.control_description:
There should be no 'linkage'
either direct or indirect between the provision of banking services offered
by the RRB to its customers and use of the insurance products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no 'linkage' either direct or indirect between the provision of banking services offered by the rrb to its customers and use of the insurance produ

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to obtain prior approval of the rbi for taking up corporate agency business for distribution of insurance products without risk participat
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall not be required to obtain prior approval of the RBI for taking up
corporate agency business for distribution of insurance products without risk
participation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to obtain prior approval of the rbi for taking up corporate agency business for distribution of insurance products without risk participat

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a report to the concerned regional office of rbi within 15 days from the date of commencement of the insurance agency business
controls.control_description:
However, an RRB shall submit a report to the concerned Regional
Office of RBI within 15 days from the date of commencement of the insurance
agency business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a report to the concerned regional office of rbi within 15 days from the date of commencement of the insurance agency business

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide physical infrastructure within its branch premises to insurance companies for selling their insurance products to the rrb's customers with ade
controls.control_description:
Under the referral arrangement, an RRB shall provide physical infrastructure
within its branch premises to insurance companies for selling their insurance
products to the RRB's customers with adequate disclosure and transparency,
and in turn earn referral fees on the basis of premia collected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide physical infrastructure within its branch premises to insurance companies for selling their insurance products to the rrb's customers with ade

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following conditions: (1) an rrb shall comply with the relevant irdai regulations applicable to referral arrangements with insurance
controls.control_description:
The above
permission shall be subject to the following conditions:
(1) An RRB shall comply with the relevant IRDAI regulations applicable to
referral arrangements with insurance companies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following conditions: (1) an rrb shall comply with the relevant irdai regulations applicable to referral arrangements with insurance

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt any restrictive practice of compelling customers to opt for a specific insurance company, particularly in respect of assets financed by the rrb
controls.control_description:
(2) An RRB shall not adopt any restrictive practice of compelling customers
to opt for a specific insurance company, particularly in respect of assets
financed by the RRB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt any restrictive practice of compelling customers to opt for a specific insurance company, particularly in respect of assets financed by the rrb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be free to exercise their own choice of insurer
controls.control_description:
Customers shall be free to exercise their own
choice of insurer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be free to exercise their own choice of insurer

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into a formal agreement with the concerned insurance company to permit use of the rrb's premises, and allow use of existing infrastructure
controls.control_description:
<image>
(3) An RRB desirous of entering into referral arrangement, in addition to
complying with IRDAI regulations, shall enter into a formal agreement
with the concerned insurance company to permit use of the RRB's
premises, and allow use of existing infrastructure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into a formal agreement with the concerned insurance company to permit use of the rrb's premises, and allow use of existing infrastructure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be for a period not exceeding three (3) years, with an rrb retaining discretion to renegotiate the terms based on service performance or enter into a
controls.control_description:
(4) The initial agreement shall be for a period not exceeding three (3) years,
with an RRB retaining discretion to renegotiate the terms based on
service performance or enter into a new agreement after the initial
period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be for a period not exceeding three (3) years, with an rrb retaining discretion to renegotiate the terms based on service performance or enter into a

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into a longer- term contract subject to board approval
controls.control_description:
(5) Upon completion of the initial period, an RRB may enter into a longer-
term contract subject to Board approval.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into a longer- term contract subject to board approval

controls.control_objective: To ensure be purely voluntary
controls.control_description:
(6) Participation of customers of an RRB in insurance products shall be
purely voluntary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be purely voluntary

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly stated in all promotional and publicity material issued by it
controls.control_description:
This must be clearly stated in all promotional and
publicity material issued by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly stated in all promotional and publicity material issued by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no direct or indirect linkage between the provision of banking services and the availing of insurance products
controls.control_description:
There shall be no direct or indirect linkage
between the provision of banking services and the availing of insurance
products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no direct or indirect linkage between the provision of banking services and the availing of insurance products

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transferred to the business of an rrb
controls.control_description:
(7) Any risk associated with the referral arrangement shall not be transferred
to the business of an RRB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transferred to the business of an rrb

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval of the rbi to undertake referral business
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall not require prior approval of the RBI to undertake referral
business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval of the rbi to undertake referral business

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in order to ensure transparency and to protect the interest of customers, mandatorily disclose to customers the details of all commissions, fees, or any other form of remuneration received
controls.control_description:
In all the activities referred to above (i.e., marketing of mutual funds, insurance
products), an RRB shall, in order to ensure transparency and to protect the
interest of customers, mandatorily disclose to customers the details of all
commissions, fees, or any other form of remuneration received, if any, from the
respective mutual fund or insurance companies whose products are being
marketed or referred.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to , in order to ensure transparency and to protect the interest of customers, mandatorily disclose to customers the details of all commissions, fees, or any other form of remuneration received

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to deploy its own devices
controls.control_description:
Deployment of Devices for Aadhaar Pay (BHIM App): An RRB intending to act
as merchant acquiring bank for Aadhaar Pay (BHIM App) shall be permitted to
deploy its own devices, subject to adherence with the following conditions:
<image>
(1) An RRB shall have obtained prior permission from the RBI for offering
mobile banking services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to deploy its own devices

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the following conditions:
controls.control_description: (2) In addition, an RRB shall comply with the following conditions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the following conditions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have undergone an information systems (is) audit within a period not exceeding six months prior to the date of application, confirming that the system
controls.control_description:
(i) RRB's Information Technology (IT) systems and Core Banking
Solution (CBS) shall have undergone an Information Systems (IS)
Audit within a period not exceeding six months prior to the date of
application, confirming that the systems are secure and robust.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have undergone an information systems (is) audit within a period not exceeding six months prior to the date of application, confirming that the system

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure availability of necessary infrastructure for application development, transaction safety and security, and effective handling of customer griev
controls.control_description:
(ii) An RRB shall ensure availability of necessary infrastructure for
application development, transaction safety and security, and
effective handling of customer grievances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure availability of necessary infrastructure for application development, transaction safety and security, and effective handling of customer griev

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in place
controls.control_description:
(iii) A customer grievance redressal mechanism, duly approved by the
Board, shall be in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place policy approved by the board on merchant acquisition for card transactions
controls.control_description:
(iv) An RRB shall put in place policy approved by the Board on
merchant acquisition for card transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place policy approved by the board on merchant acquisition for card transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no restrictions imposed by the rbi on an rrb with respect to accepting deposits or permitting withdrawals
controls.control_description:
(v) There shall be no restrictions imposed by the RBI on an RRB with
respect to accepting deposits or permitting withdrawals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no restrictions imposed by the rbi on an rrb with respect to accepting deposits or permitting withdrawals

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been subjected to any penalty imposed in the last two financial years
controls.control_description:
(vi) An RRB shall not have been subjected to any penalty imposed in
the last two financial years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been subjected to any penalty imposed in the last two financial years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to deploy its own pos devices
controls.control_description:
Deployment of POS Terminals: An RRB intending to act as merchant acquiring
bank for POS terminals shall be permitted to deploy its own POS devices,
subject to compliance with the conditions set out under paragraph 27, and the
following additional criteria:
In the preceding financial year, an RRB shall have:
(1) A net worth of ₹100 crore or more as on March 31,
(2) A Capital to Risk-Weighted Assets Ratio (CRAR) of not less than nine
percent, and
(3) Net NPAs below five percent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to deploy its own pos devices

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure strict compliance with the instructions and guidelines issued by the department of payment and settlement systems (dpss), central office, rbi o
controls.control_description:
In addition to meeting the eligibility norms stipulated above to act as merchant
acquiring banks using Aadhaar Pay - BHIM app and POS terminals, an RRB
shall ensure strict compliance with the instructions and guidelines issued by the
Department of Payment and Settlement Systems (DPSS), Central Office, RBI
on Merchant Acquisition for card transactions and POS, as amended from time
to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to ensure strict compliance with the instructions and guidelines issued by the department of payment and settlement systems (dpss), central office, rbi o

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform the respective regional office of rbi within a period of 15 days from the date of operationalising the merchant acquisition business
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall inform the respective Regional Office of RBI within a period of 15
days from the date of operationalising the merchant acquisition business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform the respective regional office of rbi within a period of 15 days from the date of operationalising the merchant acquisition business

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the requisite information directly to the department of payment and settlement systems (dpss), central office, rbi, as per the format and instr
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall submit the requisite information directly to the Department of
Payment and Settlement Systems (DPSS), Central Office, RBI, as per the format
and instructions provided in the Annex II.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the requisite information directly to the department of payment and settlement systems (dpss), central office, rbi, as per the format and instr

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
